problem id: 5ea69df4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11110010 -> 00111100
  11111010 -> 00111110
  11010000 -> 00110100
  00000111 -> 10000001
  11001100 -> 00110011
  01111010 -> 00011110
  01100100 -> 00011001
  10001011 -> 10100010
  01010111 -> 10010101

query: 10000010
predicted answer: 00100000
